title: CreateFirewallResponse
description: CreateFirewallResponse schema from Amazon Network Firewall

allOf.description: The configuration settings for the firewall. These settings include the firewall policy and the subnets in your VPC to use for the firewall endpoints.
Detailed information about the current status of a Firewall. You can retrieve this for a firewall by calling DescribeFirewall and providing the firewall name and ARN.
